hero.subline: Find out in 60 seconds. No strings attached.

benefits.title: Why optimize with AI?
benefits.b0Desc: Centralize and structure all your information to make decisions based on real context, not intuition.
benefits.b1Desc: Reduce operational costs and eliminate inefficiencies that drain your profitability month after month.
benefits.b2Desc: Free your team from repetitive tasks so they can focus on what generates value.
benefits.b3Desc: Grow in volume without multiplying errors, people, or operational complexity.

process.title: How we work
process.s0Desc: We analyze your operation, identify bottlenecks and map automation opportunities.
process.s1Desc: We deploy custom AI solutions, integrated with your current tools.
process.s2Desc: We optimize, measure results and expand automation to more areas.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a0: Absolutely. We work with end-to-end encrypted infrastructure and comply with GDPR. We never access sensitive data without explicit authorization.
faq.a1: It depends on the complexity, but most projects are operational within 2–6 weeks. We start with a functional MVP in the first few days.
faq.q2: Do I need an internal tech team?
faq.a2: No. We take care of everything: design, development, integration and maintenance. You just need someone to give us business context.
faq.a3: We connect with CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce), ERPs, ecommerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce), Slack, Notion, and virtually any API.
faq.a4: Every project is different. After the free initial audit, we present a plan with a fixed budget and estimated ROI.

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to discover how much you can save?
footer.copyright: © 2026 The AI Business. All rights reserved.

legal.privacyP1: At The AI Business we process the data you provide (name, email, calculator responses and contact messages) to send you the personalized report, respond to your inquiry and, if you authorize it, maintain commercial communication.
legal.privacyP2: We do not sell or share your data with third parties. We use providers with adequate guarantees (email delivery, hosting). Your data is retained as long as necessary for the stated purposes or to comply with legal obligations.
legal.privacyP3Pre: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction and portability by writing to
legal.privacyP3Post: . You have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority.
legal.termsP1: The use of this website and the impact calculator is free and informational. The savings and impact figures are estimates based on sector benchmarks and do not constitute a guarantee of results.
legal.termsP2: Use of the website for unlawful purposes or mass data extraction is not permitted. We reserve the right to modify these terms and the site content. Continued use after changes implies acceptance.
legal.termsP3Pre: For any legal or commercial inquiries:

report.subject: Subject:
report.subjectText: {{name}}, your personalized AI report is ready
report.scoreVeryHighInsight: Your business has exceptional transformation potential.
report.scoreHighInsight: You're in an excellent position to get fast ROI with AI automation.
report.scoreModerateInsight: There are clear improvement opportunities. Start with the highest-impact tasks.
report.scoreInitialInsight: Starting with AI now will give you a competitive advantage.
report.breakdownFactors: Factors: AI efficiency in {{sector}} ({{eff}}%), {{aiNote}}, team coordination overhead {{team}} ({{overhead}}% extra).
report.metricHoursInsight: From {{weeklyH}}h/wk of repetitive tasks, your team will recover {{hours}}h monthly. That's {{days}} full working days.
report.metricRespAbove: You're above average, there's room for improvement.
report.metricRespBelow: You're already good, but AI will take it to the next level.
report.metricRevInsight: Over {{leads}} leads with avg. ticket of €{{ticket}}. Conversion boost from {{reason}} + {{improve}}% faster response.
report.benchmarkAdoptionYes: You're already part of the {{pct}}% using AI. The next step is to scale.
report.benchmarkAdoptionNo: {{pct}}% of companies in {{sector}} already use AI. It's time to act.
report.benchmarkAbove: You're {{diff}}min above. With AI you'll reach {{target}}min.
report.benchmarkBelow: You're {{diff}}min below average. With AI you'll become a reference.
report.recReduceCosts: With potential savings of €{{savings}}/mo., we recommend starting by automating {{task}} ({{pct}}% automatable). In 6 weeks you'll have positive ROI.
report.recMoreSales: Your pipeline of {{leads}} leads/mo. with avg. ticket of €{{ticket}} has a potential of €{{rev}} additional/mo. {{h24Note}} the conversion rate increases significantly.
report.recBetterSupport: Reducing your response time from {{from}}min to {{to}}min (–{{improve}}%) will directly impact retention. {{h24Note}}
report.recBetterSupportH24Yes: You already cover 24/7, ideal for AI chatbots.
report.recBetterSupportH24No: We recommend activating 24/7 support with AI chatbots.
report.recAccelerate: With {{hours}}h/week on repetitive tasks and a team of {{team}}, automation will free {{saved}}h/mo. that your team can dedicate to high-value work.
report.quickWinsSub: 3 technology ideas selected for your profile ({{sector}} · {{team}} people · {{priority}}) that can be launched in a few weeks.
report.stackDesc: Launching all 3 ideas together, your team of {{team}} can achieve savings of €{{savings}}/mo. and generate €{{rev}}/mo. additional in the first 4–6 weeks.
report.stackNote: * Our team takes care of everything: analysis, setup and launch.
report.tw12Desc: Deep analysis of your {{count}} key processes and AI architecture design.
report.tw56Desc: Fine-tuning and measurement. Goal: {{hours}}h freed and €{{total}} impact/mo.
report.ctaSub: 30 min session · No commitment · Results in 48h
report.footerDisclaimer: * All estimates are based on sector benchmarks and the data provided.
report.footerDisclaimer2: Actual results may vary depending on implementation.

virtual-assistant.title: Virtual assistant for clients
virtual-assistant.desc: Automatic answers to your clients' most common questions, 24/7.

auto-workflows.title: Automate repetitive tasks
auto-workflows.desc: Stop {{tasks}} manually — set it up once and it runs on its own.
auto-workflows.descFallback: Stop repeating tasks manually — set it up once and it runs on its own.

smart-crm.title: Automatic sales follow-up
smart-crm.desc: No interested client goes unanswered. Automatic follow-ups and reminders.

auto-content.title: Fast content creation
auto-content.desc: Website, email and social copy in minutes instead of hours, in your brand voice.

live-dashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
live-dashboard.desc: See how your business is doing at a glance, always updated, no manual reports.

smart-scheduling.title: Automated booking & scheduling
smart-scheduling.desc: Your clients book appointments themselves from the web. Automatic reminders included.

auto-billing.title: Billing on autopilot
auto-billing.desc: Invoices, payments and reminders generated and sent without manual intervention.

smart-email.title: Personalized communication at scale
smart-email.desc: The right message to each client at the right time, automatically.

support-triage.title: Smart inquiry classification
support-triage.desc: Each inquiry is classified and routed to the right person without manual intervention.
